results.title: Upptime
results.description: Upptime is an open-source uptime monitor and status page powered by GitHub Actions, Issues, and Pages, providing scheduled checks, incident tracking, and historical data.

results.title: OneUptime
results.description: OneUptime is an open-source uptime monitoring and incident management platform that helps businesses ensure the reliability and availability of their services.

results.title: Uptime Kuma
results.description: Uptime Kuma is an easy-to-use, self-hosted monitoring tool that supports various protocols like HTTP(s), TCP, Ping, and more, with notifications via multiple services and a reactive UI.

results.title: Uptime Kuma
results.description: Uptime Kuma is a self-hosted, open-source monitoring tool that provides customizable status pages, multi-protocol monitoring, and flexible notification options.

results.title: Uptime Kuma API
results.description: Uptime Kuma API is a Python library for programmatically interacting with the Uptime Kuma monitoring service, allowing users to manage monitors, retrieve status, and perform other related actions.

results.title: Uptime Monitor
results.description: A uptime monitoring service that is easy and cheap to run at scale. Create endpoint checks for uptime, latency, and status code. Supports OpsGenie for alerts.

results.title: Uptime Watcher
results.description: Uptime Watcher is a project designed to monitor the operational status and availability of services, with documentation detailing its architecture, data management, and visualization components.

results.title: OneUptime
results.description: OneUptime is a comprehensive open-source observability platform for monitoring, incident management, status pages, on-call scheduling, log management, and application performance monitoring.

results.title: Better Stack Uptime
results.description: Better Stack Uptime provides reliable uptime monitoring, incident management, on-call scheduling, and status pages for websites and services.

results.title: Uptime Kuma Web API
results.description: A REST API wrapper for Uptime Kuma that provides easy access to monitoring features with multi-user support, Swagger documentation, and Docker deployment options.

results.title: Uptime Watcher
results.description: Uptime Watcher: Electron desktop app for monitoring websites, APIs, servers, and network services with real-time updates, response analytics, historical data visualization, and no cloud dependency.

results.title: OpenStatus
results.description: OpenStatus is an open-source global uptime monitoring platform that provides a status page and monitoring as code to track service availability and performance.

results.title: Upstash Realtime
results.description: Upstash Realtime provides an easy, fast, and type-safe way to add real-time features to Next.js projects using Redis streams and server-sent events, featuring automatic connection management and zero dependencies.

results.title: Hackatime
results.description: Hackatime is a time-tracking application that integrates with Wakatime, allowing users to monitor and manage their work time on various projects, with local development support using Docker and PostgreSQL.

results.title: hifitime
results.description: Hifitime is a powerful Rust and Python library designed for precise time management. It offers extensive functionalities for time calculation across various time scales, guaranteeing nanosecond precision for engineering and scientific applications.

results.title: Wasmtime
results.description: Wasmtime is a standalone runtime for WebAssembly, built on the Cranelift code generator for speed and security, supporting WASI and future WebAssembly proposals.

results.title: Catime
results.description: Catime is an ultra-lightweight Windows countdown tool with Pomodoro functionality, featuring a transparent interface, powerful keyboard shortcuts, and rich customization options, all while using minimal system resources.

results.title: Peekaping
results.description: Peekaping is a modern, self-hosted uptime monitoring solution built with Go and React, offering real-time notifications, status pages, and comprehensive analytics for websites, APIs, and services.

results.title: Ontime
results.description: Ontime is a browser-based application that manages event rundowns, scheduling, and cueing, designed for live environments to facilitate team collaboration and real-time updates.

results.title: UpSnap
results.description: UpSnap is a web application for waking up devices on a local network using the Wake-on-LAN protocol, featuring a dashboard, timed events, network scanning, and user management.

results.title: Upbit API
results.description: Upbit API provides access to real-time and historical price data (Quotation) and enables order, deposit, withdrawal, and asset management (Exchange) through REST API and WebSocket integration.

results.title: Wasmtime
results.description: Wasmtime is a high-level API to expose the Wasmtime runtime, a standalone WebAssembly runtime.

results.title: Wasmtime
results.description: Wasmtime is a WebAssembly engine that executes JIT-compiled or ahead-of-time compiled WebAssembly modules and components with a safe, efficient, and ergonomic embedding API.

results.title: UptimeRobot API v3
results.description: UptimeRobot's REST API allows developers to manage monitors, alert contacts, and maintenance windows, providing data in JSON format with rate limiting and various API key types for access.

results.title: Checkmate
results.description: Checkmate is an open-source, self-hosted application for real-time uptime and infrastructure monitoring, tracking server hardware, response times, and incidents with detailed visualizations and alerts.

results.title: Phare (llmstxt)
results.description: Phare is a platform for monitoring website and API uptime, with features for creating alert rules, managing incidents, and integrating with various communication channels like Discord, Slack, and SMS.

results.title: Constime
results.description: Constime is a Rust library that brings Zig's compile-time (`comptime`) functionality to Rust, enabling code execution at compile time with zero dependencies.

results.title: WakaTime API v1
results.description: The WakaTime API allows developers to access and integrate coding activity data, including stats, summaries, and leaderboards, into their own applications and plugins using REST conventions and OAuth 2.0 authentication.

results.title: Crabtime
results.description: Crabtime offers a novel way to write Rust macros, inspired by Zig's comptime, providing more flexibility and ease of use than traditional Rust macro systems.

results.title: GreptimeDB
results.description: GreptimeDB is a high-performance, distributed, cloud-native time-series database designed for real-time analytics and monitoring.
